title: Stone x Iron Chests
description: This mod adds the Stone Chests to the Iron Chests mod progression
body:
This mod acts as the "missing link" between Stone Chest and Iron Chests, adding a dedicated stone tier to the Iron Chests progression.

**Features:**

- The Stone Tier: 36 slots of storage (4x9 grid).
- Recipe Integration: Use stone chests in Copper Chest recipes to save on resources.
- Compatibility: Fully compatible with existing Stone Chest and Iron Chests saves.
- Note: Like other Iron Chests, these do not form double chests.

Requirements:

- [Stone Chest](https://modrinth.com/mod/stone-chest)
- [Iron Chests](https://modrinth.com/mod/iron-chests)
- Note: Please ensure the version numbers of Stone Chest and this mod match.

**What's New (v1.3.0-fix):**

- No more recipe conflicts! Removed overlaps with the vanilla Furnace. `Polymorph` is no longer needed.
- Stonecutter Support: You can now dismantle extra stone chests using a Stonecutter.
